<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="1; url=https://henrikbengtsson.github.io/talk-user2026-rw/">
  <title>Futureverse Right Here, Right Now!</title>
</head>
<body>
<h1>Futureverse Right Here, Right Now!</h1>

<p>
This page will redirect to my next presentation or tutorial when the time comes.
</p>
<p>    
If you are not redirected automatically, go to <a href="https://henrikbengtsson.github.io/talk-user2026-rw/">"https://henrikbengtsson.github.io/talk-user2026-rw/</a>.
</p>    
<p>
Stay tuned!
</p>
<p>
<em>Henrik</em>
</p>
</body>
</html>
